concerns.text: T044 'Documentation updates at research.md' lacks concrete deliverable. What specific sections? What content? No verification criteria (e.g., 'update FR-001 description to include ANCOVA fallback').
T045 'Code cleanup and refactoring across all modules' has no concrete deliverable or verification. Which modules? What criteria define 'cleanup' complete?
T047 'Additional unit tests at tests/unit/ for edge cases' overlaps with T046a-c and lacks specific file/test names. Should be merged into T046a-c or given concrete test function names.
